markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.006 — Notice of Change of Address

A dealer or manufacturer who has been issued dealer’s, converter’s, or manufacturer’s license plates shall notify the department of a change to the dealer’s, converter’s, or manufacturer’s address not later than the 10th day after the date the change occurs.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 76, Sec. 6, eff. May 14, 2001.*
